checklist.item: Project name, author, version, date, contact, short description are present.
Persona phrase is included verbatim.
Document versioning and changelog stub are present.
One-paragraph purpose, scope, and constraints.
Single-line ASCII/text diagram showing components and data flows.
Short responsibility statement for each component.
Frontend components with responsibilities, pages, UX flows offline behavior, etc.
Backend endpoints, protocols, versioning, error model.
Worker services tasks, queueing, idempotency.
Databases schema summary, vector store storage strategy.
ML components, LLM orchestration, model selection.
Infra (proxy, TLS, monitoring), CI/CD pipelines, Observability, Security.
Full list of endpoints with method, path, request/response schema, status codes, error object format.
Idempotency and rate-limiting rules.
Streaming contract (SSE/WebSocket) for LLM streaming.
Tables with fields, types, indexes, constraints, and example rows for users, conversations, messages, media, embeddings, audit_logs.
Partitioning and archiving strategy explicitly defined for large tables.
Object key patterns defined.
Signed URL flow for uploads and downloads documented.
Retention, lifecycle rules, and backup schedules explicitly stated.
JWT lifecycle, refresh token rules, and cookie vs header usage detailed.
OAuth connectors and 2FA flow explained.
RBAC matrix with exact permissions per role provided.
Exact system prompt text(s) enforcing persona phrase and behavior rules included.
Rules for when the persona phrase must appear verbatim are defined.
Post-processing checks to ensure persona compliance are documented.
Chunking strategy (including splitters, chunk size, and overlap) defined.
Embedding model and exact dimensions (1536) align with schema definition.
Similarity metric and explicit similarity thresholds defined.
Re-ranking rules (initial vs visual/returned candidate size) defined.
Provenance metadata schema documented for citations.
Queue names, roles, and message flow are specified.
Payload schemas and idempotency key handling are documented.
Retry/backoff policy and dead-letter handling defined.
Key monitoring metrics specified.
Audio normalization and canonical formats are defined.
FFmpeg transcoding command presets are specified.
TTS voice management, synthesis, and caching policies are documented.
CDN delivery and caching strategies are defined.

sections.title: Speaker verification enrollment and verification flows

checklist.item: Enrollment UX steps, quality metrics, and audio capture guidelines are defined.
Embedding storage format and model references are specified.
Cosine similarity matching threshold and verification logic details are provided.
Fallback mechanisms for authentication failure are documented.
Verbatim biometric consent UI text is included.
Design tokens, breakpoints, and theme colors defined.
Collapsible navigation with animated icons and touch ripple details included.
Service worker pattern, PWA details, and performance/Lighthouse targets documented.
Core UI flows (Onboarding, Chat, Upload, Settings/Admin) described in detail.
Error states and recovery UX for at least three common failure scenarios are provided.
Unit, integration, E2E, load, security, and accessibility test requirements defined.
Test coverage targets and acceptance thresholds documented.
Automated test matrix and CI job definitions included.
Next-gen quality gates (Lighthouse CI, Offline E2E, Persona Drift Test) defined.
Git branching model, SemVer tagging, and GHCR multi-arch container registries defined.
VPS deployment (Docker Compose and systemd runners) specified.
Client-side Edge deployment (Vercel PWA tier) documented.
Zero-downtime DB migrations (expand/contract) and rapid rollback procedures defined.
Encryption/Secrets Management architecture detailed.
Termux-backup sync script pipelines and native device intent hooks defined.
